positive: A vibrant, stylized minimalist illustration featuring a cluster of fantastical bioluminescent deep-sea flora and fauna. The central elements include large, stylized jellyfish with flowing, translucent tentacles and glowing coral formations that mimic geometric abstract patterns. The overall composition is contained within a circular, symmetrical medallion layout, suitable for a chest print. Use high-contrast, neon-adjacent color palette (electric blues, cyan, vibrant magenta, lime green) against a deep, midnight indigo background. The style should be a blend of Art Deco etching and contemporary Japanese woodblock printing, emphasizing strong silhouettes and clean, graphic lines. Focus on radial symmetry and decorative harmony. Digital vector illustration, extreme detail, perfect symmetry, pop art aesthetic, highly decorative.
